title: Crunchy Middle Eastern Purple Sprouting Broccoli Ouzi
description: A funky and springy Middle Eastern dish featuring purple sprouting broccoli, perfect for a hangover cure, served in a lacquerware bowl.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the purple sprouting broccoli and cut it into florets.
In a large bowl, whisk together the lacquer glaze, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, sumac, salt, and black pepper.
Add the broccoli florets to the bowl and toss to coat with the glaze mixture.
Spread the broccoli on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 15 minutes.
While the broccoli is roasting, toast the pine nuts in a small skillet over medium heat.
Once the broccoli is done, remove it from the oven and top it with the toasted pine nuts and chopped parsley.
Serve the Crunchy Middle Eastern Purple Sprouting Broccoli Ouzi in a lacquerware bowl.
